title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・もっかい！

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Here we are at the spring Tenno Sho! They've
entered their second lap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
(Ugh... Why do we have to go around this thing
twice? This is way too long...)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
(My legs are heavy... I can't breathe... Why am I...
running...)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Oof. Is Gold Ship going to be okay in that
position?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hehehe... AHAHAHAHA!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I wanna wiiin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Haha... Look at your face.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I literally... just ran a race, and my face... is
drenched in sweat. What... do you expect?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I'm not talking about how good you look. What
I'm tryna say is, well...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: ...You just keep on being your dumb self.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Uhh, yeah, I will? I'm gonna keep being dumb,
and I'm gonna surpass—

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Next up is the Takarazuka Kinen! Smell ya later!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...What's with her?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What was that just now?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Freakin' Golshi... What does that even
mean? "Keep on being your dumb self"...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: You're way dumber than me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After getting back to the waiting room, Tosen
Jordan falls onto the couch, exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And no wonder—she gave everything she had out
on those 3,200 meters of turf.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All to accomplish her new goal of surpassing that
one rival.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That drive is what kept her going, what kept her
grounded even in a race as lofty as the Tenno
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When she has a goal in her sights, she'll grit her
teeth and forge onward with a competitive spirit
that's second to none.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh... I can finally feel my legs again. I'm dead
tired...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ahaha... Right? I am going to be the greatest dummy, after all.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
So, we're good with the Takarazuka Kinen being
next, right? Golshi was talking about it.
choice_data_list: You want to challenge her again?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Why not? She's more of a dummy than me, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At any rate, there's no sense in refusing a
showdown with a rival she can hone her skills
against.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Which means we're heading for the Takarazuka
Kinen, the last leg of the Senior Spring Triple
Crown.
